settings.title: Settings
settings.connectionsDesc: Live status of all external API connections and data sources.
settings.strategyHint: Strategy settings are configured per preset. Go to Presets to edit.

bot.title: Bot Control
bot.noKeysConfigured: No API keys configured for this exchange.

guide.title: Getting Started
guide.subtitle: This guide will help you set up and use the Trading Bot.
guide.step1Desc: Connect your exchange so the bot can trade.
guide.step1Detail2: Select your exchange (e.g. Bitget, Weex, or Hyperliquid) from the dropdown.
guide.step1Detail3: Enter your API Key, Secret Key, and Passphrase (if required). You can find these in your exchange's API settings.
guide.step1Detail4: Click 'Test Connection' to verify everything works.
guide.step2Desc: Create a configuration preset with your preferred trading parameters.
guide.step2Detail1: Go to the Presets page and click 'New Preset'.
guide.step2Detail2: Enter a name (e.g. 'Conservative BTC') and select the exchange.
guide.step2Detail3: Configure leverage, position size, take-profit, and stop-loss based on your risk tolerance.
guide.step2Detail4: Select the trading pairs the bot should trade (e.g. BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT).
guide.step3Desc: Adjust the strategy parameters to match your trading style.
guide.step3Detail1: Under Settings > Strategy you can adjust thresholds for Fear & Greed Index, Funding Rate, and more.
guide.step3Detail2: Lower thresholds = more conservative (fewer trades, higher quality).
guide.step3Detail3: Make sure the daily trade and loss limits match your risk appetite.
guide.step4Desc: Start the bot and monitor its activity.
guide.step4Detail1: Go to Bot Control and select your exchange and preset.
guide.step4Detail2: Start in Demo Mode first to test the strategy without real money.
guide.step4Detail3: Monitor the Dashboard for open positions, PnL, and statistics.
guide.step4Detail4: Switch to Live Mode only when you are satisfied with the demo results.
guide.step5Desc: Keep track of your trading performance.
guide.step5Detail1: The Trades page shows the complete history of all executed trades.
guide.step5Detail2: The Tax Report provides a yearly summary with monthly breakdown.
guide.step5Detail3: Export the tax report as CSV for your tax filing.
guide.step6Desc: Important notes for safe bot operation.
guide.step6Detail1: Use API keys with restricted permissions (trading only, no withdrawals).
guide.step6Detail2: Always start with small position sizes and low leverage.
guide.step6Detail3: Set realistic stop-loss values and monitor the bot regularly.
guide.tipText: Test every new configuration in Demo Mode first. This lets you evaluate the strategy's performance with real-time market data without risking real capital. Only switch to Live Mode once you are satisfied with the results.
